workflow_steps.name: reference_claim_qa
workflow_steps.description: Verify every claim has a supporting reference with a valid identifier

workflow_steps.name: figure_contract_qa
workflow_steps.description: Verify every figure has a declared contract: core conclusion, evidence chain, export format

workflow_steps.name: paragraph_structure_qa
workflow_steps.description: Detect fragmented paragraphs and uniform AI sentence rhythm

workflow_steps.name: ai_style_qa
workflow_steps.description: Detect hedge-word overuse, transition-word density, and bullet contamination

workflow_steps.name: render_basic_outputs
workflow_steps.description: Render manuscript to DOCX and PDF

reference_claim_support_QA.purpose: Claims must be supported by cited sources with valid identifiers.

figure_contract_QA.purpose: Every figure must have a declared contract before generation or inclusion.

ai_style_human_voice_QA.purpose: AI-style artifacts must be below threshold.

paragraph_structure_QA.purpose: Paragraph rhythm must be review-like, not fragmented or uniformly AI-generated.

workflow_execution_audit_QA.purpose: Author must review workflow_execution_audit_vN.json and set Status: PASS.

author_declarations_QA.purpose: Author fields (affiliations, funding, COI, CRediT) must be completed by the author.
